headline: CP Group Announces Nearly 25,000 SF of Leasing Activity at Harris Corners in Charlotte, NC
summary: CHARLOTTE, N.C., June 23, 2026--CP Group, a prominent owner-operator of office properties throughout the Sunbelt, today announced nearly 25,000 square feet of leasing activity across three new deals at Harris Corners — its three-building, Class A office campus totaling 371,000 square feet in Charlotte, North Carolina.
